tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]Ebm7[/ch] [ch]Gbm9[/ch] [ch]Gb/Ab[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab]           [ch]Db[/ch]           [ch]Ab/C[/ch]         [ch]Gb/Bb[/ch]
When I'm lost, in the rain, in your eyes[/tab]
[tab]                              [ch]Ebm7/Ab[/ch]   [ch]Ab[/ch]
I know I'll find the light to light my way.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ebm7/Ab[/ch]    [ch]Db[/ch]         [ch]Ab/C[/ch]              [ch]Fbmaj9[/ch]
When I'm scared, losing ground, when my world is going crazy,[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Ebm7[/ch]
You can turn it all around yes[/tab]
[tab][ch]F7#5[/ch]                               [ch]Bbm7[/ch]
    And when I'm down you're there pushing me to the top.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ebm7[/ch]                             [ch]Ebm7/Ab[/ch]
   You're always there givin' me all you've got.[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]        [ch]Db[/ch]              [ch]Ebm7[/ch]         [ch]Db/F[/ch]        [ch]Gbmaj7[/ch]           [ch]Ebm7[/ch]           [ch]Ebm7/Ab[/ch]
For a shield from the storm, for a friend for a love to keep me safe and warm, I turn to you.[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Db[/ch]              [ch]Ebm7[/ch]          [ch]Db/F[/ch]           [ch]Cbmaj9[/ch]
For the strength to be strong, for the will to carry on,[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Ebm7[/ch]                  [ch]A/B[/ch]              [ch]Ebm7/Ab[/ch]         [ch]Db[/ch]      [ch]Amaj7/E[/ch]
For everything you do for everything that's true I turn to you, yes.[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Ebm7[/ch]       [ch]Db[/ch]               [ch]Ab/C[/ch]        [ch]Gb/Bb[/ch]                            [ch]Ebm7/Ab[/ch]  [ch]Ab[/ch]
    When I lose the will to win I just reach for you and I can reach the sky again.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ebm7/Ab[/ch]    [ch]Db[/ch]    [ch]Ab/C[/ch]               [ch]Fbmaj9[/ch]
     I can do anything, 'cause your love is so amazing,[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Ebm7[/ch]
Cause your love inspires me.[/tab]
[tab][ch]F7#5[/ch]                               [ch]Bbm7[/ch]
   And when I need a friend you're always on my side,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ebm7[/ch]                            [ch]Ebm7/Ab[/ch]
   Givin' me faith to get me through the night.[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]        [ch]Db[/ch]              [ch]Ebm7[/ch]         [ch]Db/F[/ch]        [ch]Gbmaj7[/ch]           [ch]Ebm7[/ch]           [ch]Ebm7/Ab[/ch]
For a shield from the storm, for a friend for a love to keep me safe and warm, I turn to you.[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Db[/ch]              [ch]Ebm7[/ch]          [ch]Db/F[/ch]           [ch]Cbmaj9[/ch]
For the strength to be strong, for the will to carry on,[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Ebm7[/ch]                        [ch]Db[/ch]
For everything you do I turn to you, yes.[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Cbmaj9[/ch]                      [ch]Bbm7[/ch]
      For the arms to be my shelter through all the rain.[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Ab7sus[/ch]
For truth that will never change.[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Abm7/Db[/ch]  [ch]Db[/ch]  [ch]Abm7/D[/ch] [ch]Db[/ch]
For some-----one to     lean on.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cbmaj9[/ch]                    [ch]Gb/Bb[/ch]
      For a heart I can rely on through anything.[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Ebm7/Ab[/ch]       N.C
For the one who I can run to[/tab]
N.C
Oh yeah
(so do you oh yeah)

[Chorus]
[tab]         [ch]Eb[/ch]             [ch]Fm7[/ch]          [ch]Eb/G[/ch]         [ch]Abmaj7[/ch]          [ch]Fm7[/ch]
For a shield from the storm, for a friend, for a love to keep me safe and warm[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Fm7/Bb[/ch]
I turn to you[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Eb[/ch]            [ch]Fm7[/ch]            [ch]Eb/G[/ch]           [ch]Dbmaj9[/ch]
For the strength to be strong, for the will to carry on.[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Fm7[/ch]
For everything you do (everything you do)[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Cb/Db[/ch]             [ch]Fm7/Bb[/ch]
For everything that's true[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Fm7[/ch]
For everything you do[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Cb/Db[/ch]             [ch]Fm7/Bb[/ch]
For everything that's true[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Eb[/ch]
I turn to you.[/tab]
